His urological history began this year with PCA elevation of four point nine with ratio of zero point seventeen and PCA density of zero point thirty two. The digital rectal exam found a nodule in left lobe. The transreptor ultrasound-guided biopsy found a bilateral adenocarcinoma, Gleason IV plus IV. The CT scan and bone scan were negative.
